control.description-key: LeanToolKit meeting scheduler — recurring meetings (time + days) plus a crew roster pattern (weekday / 2 crews alternating / 4 crews continuous). Generates dated occurrences with the crew on shift, shown in a rolling preview and emitted on Occurrences (JSON).

property.name: inputJSON
property.description-key: Card document to preload: {schema, meta, data:{meetings:[{id,name,time,durationMin,days}], roster:{pattern,anchor,crews,swingDays}, horizonDays}}.

property.name: resetTrigger
property.description-key: Reloads the control from Input JSON whenever this value CHANGES (e.g. Set(varReset, Text(Now()))).

property.name: outputJSON
property.description-key: The edited schedule configuration. Read in OnChange and Patch to Dataverse.

property.name: occurrencesJSON
property.description-key: The generated meeting occurrences over the horizon: [{date, day, time, iso, meetingId, meeting, durationMin, crew, shift}]. Consume in the app or a Flow for countdowns and reminders.

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar. Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional coaching prompts: plain text, or JSON array of strings / {field, hint} objects. Shown as empty-state text, an info popover, and field hints.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for highlights (today marker, buttons). Default rich black.

property.name: legendColors
property.description-key: JSON array or CSV: [unused, crew 1, crew 2, crew 3, crew 4] badge colours. Defaults blue / green / amber / purple.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for all text.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, disables all editing (display mode).

property.name: pngExport
property.description-key: Read-only PNG snapshot as a data URI, for an Image control or Power Automate.
